mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO financehub.overseas_stock_daily_trading (data_hash, bass_dt, isu_cd, isu_nm, excd, curr, cls_prc, opn_prc, hgst_prc, lwst_prc, acc_trd_vol, fluc_rt) VALUES
(#{item.dataHash}, #{item.bassDt}, #{item.isuCd}, #{item.isuNm}, #{item.excd}, #{item.curr}, #{item.clsPrc}, #{item.opnPrc}, #{item.hgstPrc}, #{item.lwstPrc}, #{item.accTrdVol}, #{item.flucRt})
ON CONFLICT (bass_dt, isu_cd, excd) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT ON (isu_cd, excd) id, bass_dt AS bassDt, isu_cd AS isuCd, isu_nm AS isuNm, excd, curr, cls_prc AS clsPrc, opn_prc AS opnPrc, hgst_prc AS hgstPrc, lwst_prc AS lwstPrc, acc_trd_vol AS accTrdVol, fluc_rt AS flucRt, data_hash AS dataHash FROM financehub.overseas_stock_daily_trading WHERE isu_nm ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR isu_cd ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY isu_cd, excd, bass_dt DESC LIMIT #{limit}
